themes.theme_summary: The overarching theme of these reviews is the extremely poor experience users have with the app's customer support and technical issues, leading to frustration and dissatisfaction. This is compounded by unexpected charges and glitches that affect the trading experience.
quotes: The worst app I have ever seen in my whole life The cheater sala bought it but when I sell the app glitch and also customer care support not attending any calls or response
I have a very poor experience. Customer Support is pathetic. Experiencing technical glitches but no reliable support.
Charges unnecessary hidden charges. Does not offer free online Closure and transfer service. Should not be downloaded. Worst app for trading. Does not care about customers.
action_ideas: Improve customer support responsiveness and quality
Address and fix technical glitches affecting the trading platform
Review and adjust charging policies for transparency and fairness

themes.theme_summary: Users are experiencing problems with the app's trading functionality, including auto-exit issues, high brokerage charges, and difficulties with buying and selling stocks. These issues are leading to financial losses and frustration among users.

very High brokerage
exit karte vakt gilch ho raha update kro app ko
action_ideas: Improve the app's auto-exit feature to prevent unexpected losses
Review and adjust brokerage charges to be more competitive
Enhance the user interface to make buying and selling stocks more efficient and user-friendly

themes.theme_summary: The reviews express a mix of positive and negative sentiments about the trading app, with some users finding it useful for beginners and others criticizing its limitations and potential for overtrading. The app's usability and features are a point of contention among users.

Add a kill switch to prevent overtrading
Enhance the app's user interface for better navigation and control

The core issue is the balance between maintaining simplicity and adding features.
